title: Art Subjects
entries: a long-dead king crowned beneath a comet
a coronation interrupted by an omen
the founding of a city now in ruins
a great battle between two vanished nations
a hero's last stand on a burning bridge
the fall of an angel into a grey sea
a pact sealed between a mortal and something older
a wedding feast where one guest casts no shadow
a saint healing the sick outside a plague-city
a dragon coiled around a drowned tower
a hunt across a frozen lake at dusk
a garden of statues that were once people
the alignment of three moons over a temple
a mob dragging an idol through the streets
a ship of the dead making landfall
a scholar reading to an empty throne
a duel of mages atop a thunderhead
a caravan crossing a desert of glass
a mother and child fleeing a wave of fire
a masked court dancing while a city burns below
a forest swallowing a marching army
a leviathan surfacing beneath fishing boats
the raising of a standing stone by torchlight
a market of impossible creatures
a lighthouse keeper signalling to something in the fog
twin siblings on opposite thrones
a funeral procession winding up a mountain
a knight kneeling to a crowned skeleton
the moment a great tree was felled
an empty banquet, every chair pushed back at once
